text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Time to raise the roof, up and up!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: We'll hit 'em with a whahey and a woo♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You both seem excited. Something happen?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Have I got a story for you! 
No choice but to shake it off☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You got that right, sis! And all us peeps 
are here to party with ya!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's calm down. 
What's the occasion?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Find out by coming to the faculty room 
with us♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well I kinda blanked on doing aaall my 
homework! Five subjects worth of teachers 
are on my case now! Hilarious, right?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
My sides are in party mode already, how can
we not celebrate!? And like, five? Actually
makes it sound more legit! You're settin' 
a world record for suuuure!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh.… All right, I'll tag along. Just make sure to properly apologize.
